getStarted.title: Get started with AI agents
getStarted.description: Hand off tasks to autonomous AI agents that iterate until the job is done. Run them locally, in the background, or in the cloud, with your choice of AI provider. Track all sessions without leaving VS Code.

featured.title: Learn about the agent loop
featured.description: Understand the core concepts of how AI agents plan, act, and iterate to complete tasks.

featured.title: Test and debug with browser agents
featured.description: Let AI agents use the integrated browser to validate and fix issues in your application.

featured.title: Customize AI for your project
featured.description: Configure custom instructions, prompt files, and MCP servers to tailor AI to your workflow.

featured.title: Set up VS Code
featured.description: Install VS Code on Windows, macOS, or Linux and get running.

featured.title: Learn VS Code basics
featured.description: Explore the editor, settings, extensions, and key features.

featured.title: VS Code for enterprise
featured.description: Learn how to configure VS Code for enterprise environments with policies, extension management, and AI customization options.

latest.title: VS Code 1.120 release
latest.description: Run agents across all your projects with the Agents window.

latest.title: Remote control Copilot CLI
latest.description: Monitor and steer ongoing Copilot CLI sessions from github.com or GitHub Mobile.

latest.title: VS Code coding harness
latest.description: Learn about the coding harness, model evaluations, and the agent processing workflow.
